text:
Great question! Here's a breakdown of the key differences between the **Gold** and **Platinum** plans:

---

### 💰 Annual Fee
- **Gold:** $249/year
- **Platinum:** $399/year

[source: hvac_pricing v3.0 §Maintenance Plans]

---

### 🔧 Tune-Ups
- **Gold:** 2 tune-ups per year
- **Platinum:** Unlimited tune-ups

[source: hvac_pricing v3.0 §Maintenance Plans]

---

### 💸 Repair Discount
- **Gold:** 15% off repairs
- **Platinum:** 20% off repairs

[source: hvac_pricing v3.0 §Maintenance Plans]

---

### ⚡ Priority Scheduling
- **Gold:** Priority scheduling + same-day slots available before 11 AM
- **Platinum:** **Same-day priority** + same-day slots available before 11 AM

[source: hvac_pricing v3.0 §Maintenance Plans] [source: faq_booking v3.2 §How far in advance can I book?]

---

### 🛡️ Warranty & T1 Repairs
- **Gold:** Labor warranty extended to 1 year on all repairs; T1 repairs **not covered**
- **Platinum:** Labor warranty extended to 1 year on all repairs; T1 repairs **covered at no charge**

[source: warranty_terms v4.1 §Maintenance Plan Members]

---

The biggest upgrades with Platinum are the **unlimited tune-ups**, **free T1 repairs**, and the **higher repair discount**. Would you like help choosing the right plan or getting signed up?
